import React from 'react'; const Careers = () => { const jobs = [ { title: '45 MN Press Crane Operator', loc: 'Saudi Arabia', type: 'On-site', salary: 'SAR 3,500 - 4,000' }, { title: '45 MN Press Operator', loc: 'Saudi Arabia', type: 'On-site', salary: 'SAR 3,500 - 5,000' }, { title: 'AI Developer (GenAI / LLM)', loc: 'New York, USA', type: 'Hybrid', salary: 'Competitive' }, { title: 'Aftermarket Sales Engineer', loc: 'Riyadh, Saudi Arabia', type: 'On-site', salary: 'SAR 6,000 - 8,000' }, ]; const testimonials = [ { name: "Tory Russo", role: "Android Developer", text: "Hudson IT helped me start my career in Android development and for that I will always be grateful." }, { name: "Christian Lorenzo", role: "Software Engineer", text: "Thank you Hudson IT for the opportunity you gave me and for trusting me in such an important project." }, { name: "Samuel Hatem", role: "iOS Developer", text: "Hudson IT gave me my first opportunity into professional iOS development. They helped schedule multiple interviews." } ]; return (
{/* 1. FULL WIDTH HEADER */}

Careers Solutions

Expert staffing for power grids, industrial wiring, and renewable energy projects worldwide.

{/* Jobs Board Section */}

Open positions

{/* Simple Filters */}
{/* Jobs List */}
{jobs.map((job, i) => (

{job.title}

{job.loc} • {job.type}

{job.salary}
))}
{/* Testimonials Section */}

Employees
Testimonials.

Hear directly from our dedicated employees who contribute to our success each day.

{testimonials.map((t, i) => (

"{t.text}"

{t.name[0]}

{t.name}

{t.role}

))}

Start Your Career With Us

We are always looking for passionate people to join our global team.

); }; export default Careers;
